my_thoughts: With 'pilot needs knowledge' accepted, pivot to 'orator needs justice/knowledge' to link craft to ethics. Expect a deeper question or mild resistance at the transfer.
accumulated_insight: T1: Student agrees navigator needs knowledge ('Yes, because his craft demands it')?cooperative engagement via grants_analogy. They understand: role demands knowledge. Structural_mapping/RM_03 sets up transfer: orator likewise needs knowledge of justice. Pattern: accept source analogy ? apply to target next. Confidence medium because analogy acceptance usually permits mapping.
visible_response: Then a man who rules must know what is best—not merely act on desire.
